title: openclaw/openclaw
content: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞

Any OS. Any Platform

title: obra/superpowers
content: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
summary: obra/superpowers 是一个代理技能框架和软件开发方法论，强调实际有效性。
highlights: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

title: affaan-m/ECC
content: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
summary: 一个针对Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor等AI编码代理的性能优化系统，涵盖技能、直觉、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发方法。
highlights: The agent harness performance optimization system
Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development
for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond

title: n8n-io/n8n
content: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.
summary: n8n是一个公平代码的工作流自动化平台，具备原生AI能力，支持可视化构建与自定义代码结合，可自托管或使用云服务，拥有400多个集成。
highlights: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities
Combine visual building with custom code
self-host or cloud
400+ integrations

title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
content: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.

to use and to build on

title: NousResearch/hermes-agent
content: The agent that grows with you

title: ollama/ollama
content: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.1, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
summary: Ollama 是一个开源项目，支持快速运行多种大语言模型，包括 Kimi-K2.6、GLM-5.1、MiniMax、DeepSeek、gpt-oss、Qwen、Gemma 等。
highlights: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.1, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

title: anomalyco/opencode
summary: Anomalyco/OpenCode 是一个开源编码代理项目，旨在提供自动化的代码生成和辅助编程功能。
highlights: The open source coding agent.

title: multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills
content: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
summary: 一个基于Andrej Karpathy对LLM编码陷阱的观察而生成的CLAUDE.md文件，用于改善Claude Code的行为。
highlights: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior
derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls

title: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui
summary: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui 是一个基于 Gradio 库的 Stable Diffusion 网页界面，提供图像生成、编辑等功能，支持多种模型和扩展。
highlights: 提供直观的网页界面，方便用户使用 Stable Diffusion 模型生成图像。
支持多种模型、采样方法和扩展插件，功能丰富。
开源项目，社区活跃，持续更新。

title: Anthropic's open-source framework for AI-powered vulnerability discovery
content: Article URL: https://github.com/anthropics/defending-code-reference-harness Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48403980 Points: 443 # Comments: 124
summary: Anthropic 发布开源框架，用于 AI 驱动的漏洞发现，旨在提升代码安全性。
highlights: Anthropic's open-source framework for AI-powered vulnerability discovery
https://github.com/anthropics/defending-code-reference-harness

title: When AI Builds Itself: Our progress toward recursive self-improvement
content: Article URL: https://www.anthropic.com/institute/recursive-self-improvement Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48400842 Points: 466 # Comments: 625
summary: 文章探讨了人工智能实现递归自我改进的进展，即AI系统能够自主提升自身能力，无需人类干预。作者分析了当前技术路径、潜在风险及未来展望。
highlights: 递归自我改进是AI领域的关键里程碑，可能加速技术奇点的到来。
当前进展显示AI在特定任务上已能进行有限自我优化。
安全性和控制问题成为递归自我改进研究的核心挑战。

title: Introducing RadixAttention to Trellis
summary: Trellis 引入了 RadixAttention 技术，旨在优化注意力机制的性能，提升模型效率。
highlights: Introducing RadixAttention to Trellis
Comments

title: thunderbolt-ibverbs: We have InfiniBand at home
summary: 文章探讨了通过Thunderbolt接口实现类似InfiniBand的高性能网络连接，即使用消费级硬件模拟InfiniBand的功能。
highlights: We have InfiniBand at home
thunderbolt-ibverbs

title: How Endava is redesigning software delivery around AI agents
content: Learn how Endava is using AI agents, ChatGPT Enterprise, and Codex to accelerate software delivery, automate workflows, and build an AI-native culture across the enterprise.
summary: Endava 正在利用 AI 代理、ChatGPT Enterprise 和 Codex 重新设计软件交付流程，以加速开发、自动化工作流，并在整个企业中构建 AI 原生文化。
highlights: Endava is using AI agents, ChatGPT Enterprise, and Codex to accelerate software delivery
automate workflows
build an AI-native culture across the enterprise

title: Dreaming: Better memory for a more helpful ChatGPT
content: ChatGPT introduces a new memory system to better remember preferences, keeping context fresh and relevant across conversations.
summary: ChatGPT 推出新记忆系统，旨在更好地记住用户偏好，保持跨对话的上下文新鲜和相关。
highlights: ChatGPT introduces a new memory system to better remember preferences
keeping context fresh and relevant across conversations

title: Nemotron 3.5 Content Safety: Customizable Multimodal Safety for Global Enterprise AI
summary: NVIDIA 发布 Nemotron 3.5 Content Safety，一种可定制的多模态安全模型，旨在为全球企业 AI 提供内容安全过滤，支持图像和文本输入，可检测有害内容并适应不同文化和法规需求。
highlights: Nemotron 3.5 Content Safety is a customizable multimodal safety model for global enterprise AI.
It supports both image and text inputs to detect harmful content.
The model is designed to adapt to diverse cultural and regulatory requirements.

title: EVA-Bench Data 2.0: 3 Domains, 121 Tools, 213 Scenarios
summary: EVA-Bench Data 2.0 是一个涵盖3个领域、121个工具和213个场景的基准数据集，用于评估AI代理在复杂任务中的表现。
highlights: EVA-Bench Data 2.0 包含3个领域、121个工具和213个场景
用于评估AI代理在复杂任务中的表现
数据集发布在Hugging Face上
